steps.title: Add the equations
steps.content: The system is $$(x-2)-4(y+7)=117$$ $$(x-2)+4(y+7)=442.$$ Add the equations so the $-4(y+7)$ and $+4(y+7)$ terms cancel.

steps.title: Target the requested expression
steps.content: Adding gives $$2(x-2)=117+442=559.$$ The question asks for $6(x-2)$, which is $3$ times $2(x-2)$.

steps.title: Confirm the shortcut
steps.content: There is no need to find $x$ or $y$ separately. The elimination step gives the requested expression directly, so the answer is 1677.
